title: Question: Retain verilog hirarchy in c++ class hirarchy ?
body:
---


Author Name: **Konrad Eisele** (@eiselekd)
Original Redmine Message: 2796 from https://www.veripool.org



---

A Verilator newbee question:
When I specify a hirarchical verilog design with multiple modules, split in several files, is the design then always 
flattend to a single c++ class or is there a possibility that verilator retains the hierarchy by createing a class for 
each seperate module ?
